Title: #1 Feed the cat
Caption: Feed The Cat, 2025
BodyText: This site is inspired by the viral Hello Street Cat project. The creator, who goes by the name Xavi, originally started it to see and care for their cat Bishop when they were away from home. They further wanted other people to also get to watch Bishop eat, slowly turning the through into a community experience by adding live chat and radio functions.
